lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਕਲ ਲਿਵ ਰਹੈ ਕਰਨ ਸਿਉ ਇਛਾ ਚਾਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa akal liv rahai karan siau ichhaa chaarah |
lines.english: Your mind remains lovingly attuned to the Lord forever; You do whatever you desire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੈ ਤਤੁ ਜਾਣਿਓ ਸਰਬ ਗਤਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਬਿਡਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: eihai tat jaanio sarab gat alakh biddaanee |
lines.english: You realize this reality, that the Lord is All-pervading, Unseen and Amazing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦ੍ਰੁਮ ਸਪੂਰ ਜਿਉ ਨਿਵੈ ਖਵੈ ਕਸੁ ਬਿਮਲ ਬੀਚਾਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: drum sapoor jiau nivai khavai kas bimal beechaarah |
lines.english: Like the tree heavy with fruit, You bow in humility, and endure the pain of it; You are pure of thought.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਭਾਇ ਸੰਚਿਓ ਕਿਰਣਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਕਲ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj bhaae sanchio kiran amrit kal baanee |
lines.english: With intuitive ease, You send forth the rays of the Ambrosial Word of power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਗਮਿ ਪ੍ਰਮਾਣੁ ਤੈ ਪਾਇਓ ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਗ੍ਰਾਹਜਿ ਲਯੌ ॥
lines.translit: gur gam pramaan tai paaeo sat santokh graahaj layau |
lines.english: You have risen to the state of the certified Guru; you grasp truth and contentment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਬਿਸਾਸੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਗਹਰਿ ਗਹੁ ਹਦਰਥਿ ਦੀਓ ॥
lines.translit: man bisaas paaeo gehar gahu hadarath deeo |
lines.english: My mind has faith, that the Prophet has given You access to the Profound Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪਰਸਿਓ ਕਲੁ ਸਮੁਲਵੈ ਜਨ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਲਹਣੇ ਭਯੌ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: har parasio kal samulavai jan darasan lahane bhayau |6|
lines.english: KAL proclaims, that whoever attains the Blessed Vision of the Darshan of Lehnaa, meets with the Lord. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਿਦਿ ਬਿਗਾਸੁ ਜਾਗਿਓ ਅਲਖਿ ਕਲ ਧਰੀ ਜੁਗੰਤਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: rid bigaas jaagio alakh kal dharee jugantar |
lines.english: Your Heart has blossomed forth in awareness of the Unseen Lord, who has infused His Power throughout the ages.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਰਲ ਨਾਸੁ ਤਨਿ ਨਠਯੋ ਅਮਿਉ ਅੰਤਰਗਤਿ ਪੀਓ ॥
lines.translit: garal naas tan natthayo amiau antaragat peeo |
lines.english: Your body has been purged of the deadly poison; You drink the Ambrosial Nectar deep within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਹਜ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਰਵਿਓ ਸਾਮਾਨਿ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sehaj samaadh ravio saamaan nirantar |
lines.english: O True Guru, You are intuitively absorbed in Samaadhi, with continuity and equality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਦਾਰਉ ਚਿਤ ਦਾਰਿਦ ਹਰਨ ਪਿਖੰਤਿਹ ਕਲਮਲ ਤ੍ਰਸਨ ॥
lines.translit: audaarau chit daarid haran pikhantih kalamal trasan |
lines.english: You are open-minded and large-hearted, the Destroyer of poverty; seeing You, sins are afraid.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਅਵਖਧੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਆਧਾਰੁ ਅਰੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਦਾ ਨਾਮ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ਸੋਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: naam avakhadh naam aadhaar ar naam samaadh sukh sadaa naam neesaan sohai |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is our medicine; the Naam is our support; the Naam is the peace of Samaadhi. The Naam is the insignia which embellishes us forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦ ਰੰਗਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਕਲੁ ਉਚਰੈ ਜਸੁ ਜੰਪਉ ਲਹਣੇ ਰਸਨ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sad rang sehaj kal ucharai jas janpau lahane rasan |7|
lines.english: Says KAL, I lovingly, continually, intuitively chant the Praises of Lehnaa with my tongue. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤੌ ਨਾਮ ਸਿਉ ਕਲ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰਹ ਬੋਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: rang ratau naam siau kal naam sur narah bohai |
lines.english: KAL is imbued with the Love of the Naam, the Naam which is the fragrance of gods and human beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਪਰਸੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਪਾਇਓ ਸਤੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਿਓ ਰਵਿ ਲੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naam paras jin paaeo sat pragattio rav loe |
lines.english: Whoever obtains the Naam, the Philosopher's Stone, becomes the embodiment of Truth, manifest and radiant throughout the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸਨਿ ਪਰਸਿਐ ਗੁਰੂ ਕੈ ਅਠਸਠਿ ਮਜਨੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: darasan parasiai guroo kai atthasatth majan hoe |8|
lines.english: Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan, it is as if one has bathed at the sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਤੀਰਥੁ ਸਚੁ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ਅਰੁ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਭਾਉ ਸਚੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਭਾਖੰਤੁ ਸੋਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: sach teerath sach isanaan ar bhojan bhaau sach sadaa sach bhaakhant sohai |
lines.english: The True Name is the sacred shrine, the True Name is the cleansing bath of purification and food. The True Name is eternal love; chant the True Name, and be embellished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੰਗਤੀ ਬੋਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: sach paaeo gur sabad sach naam sangatee bohai |
lines.english: The True Name is obtained through the Word of the Guru's Shabad; the Sangat, the Holy Congregation, is fragrant with the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸਨਿ ਪਰਸਿਐ ਗੁਰੂ ਕੈ ਸਚੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: darasan parasiai guroo kai sach janam paravaan |9|
lines.english: Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan, one's life is approved and certified in the True Name. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਚੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਵਰਤੁ ਸਚੁ ਕਬਿ ਜਨ ਕਲ ਵਖਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis sach sanjam varat sach kab jan kal vakhaan |
lines.english: KAL the poet utters the Praises of the one whose self-discipline is the True Name, and whose fast is the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਿਅ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸੁਭ ਕਰੈ ਹਰੈ ਅਘ ਪਾਪ ਸਕਲ ਮਲ ॥
lines.translit: amia drisatt subh karai harai agh paap sakal mal |
lines.english: When You bestow Your Ambrosial Glance of Grace, You eradicate all wickedness, sin and filth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਅਰੁ ਲੋਭ ਮੋਹ ਵਸਿ ਕਰੈ ਸਭੈ ਬਲ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh ar lobh moh vas karai sabhai bal |
lines.english: Sexual desire, anger, greed and emotional attachment - You have overcome all these powerful passions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਦਰੀਆਉ ਜਨਮ ਹਮ ਕਾਲਖ ਧੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur nav nidh dareeaau janam ham kaalakh dhovai |
lines.english: The Guru is the river of the nine treasures, washing off the dirt of our lives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੰਸਾਰਹ ਖੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sukh man vasai dukh sansaarah khovai |
lines.english: Your mind is filled with peace forever; You banish the sufferings of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸਨਿ ਪਰਸਿਐ ਗੁਰੂ ਕੈ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: darasan parasiai guroo kai janam maran dukh jaae |10|
lines.english: Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of the Guru, the pains of death and rebirth are taken away. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁ ਕਹੁ ਟਲ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: su kahu ttal gur seveeai ahinis sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: So speaks TAL the poet: serve the Guru, day and night, with intuitive love and affection.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਵਈਏ ਮਹਲੇ ਤੀਜੇ ਕੇ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: saveee mahale teeje ke 3 |
lines.english: Swaiyas In Praise Of The Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਭਗਤ ਭਵਜਲ ਤਾਰੇ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਸੋਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਰਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin bhagat bhavajal taare simarahu soee naam paradhaan |
lines.english: He carries His devotees across the terrifying world-ocean; meditate in remembrance on His Naam, Supreme and Sublime.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਸਿਵਰਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਇਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਛਲੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: soee purakh sivar saachaa jaa kaa ik naam achhal sansaare |
lines.english: Dwell upon that Primal Being, the True Lord God; in this world, His One Name is Undeceivable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਿ ਜਨ ਕਲੵ ਸਬੁਧੀ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਜਨ ਅਮਰਦਾਸ ਬਿਸ੍ਤਰੀਯਾ ॥
lines.translit: kav jan kalay sabudhee keerat jan amaradaas bistareeyaa |
lines.english: So speaks KALL the poet: the glory of the wise, sublime and humble Amar Daas is spread throughout the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਸਿਕੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਲਹਣਾ ਥਪਿਓ ਜੇਨ ਸ੍ਰਬ ਸਿਧੀ ॥
lines.translit: tit naam rasik naanak lahanaa thapio jen srab sidhee |
lines.english: Nanak delighted in the Naam; He established Lehnaa as Guru, who was imbued with all supernatural spiritual powers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਰਤਿ ਰਵਿ ਕਿਰਣਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਿ ਸੰਸਾਰਹ ਸਾਖ ਤਰੋਵਰ ਮਵਲਸਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: keerat rav kiran pragatt sansaarah saakh tarovar mavalasaraa |
lines.english: His Praises radiate throughout the world, like the rays of the sun, and the branches of the maulsar (fragrant) tree.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਤਰਿ ਦਖਿਣਹਿ ਪੁਬਿ ਅਰੁ ਪਸ੍ਚਮਿ ਜੈ ਜੈ ਕਾਰੁ ਜਪੰਥਿ ਨਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: autar dakhineh pub ar pascham jai jai kaar japanth naraa |
lines.english: In the north, south, east and west, people proclaim Your Victory.
